responseMessageContents.text: The user is providing a new Cloudflare API token and wants me to deploy the worker. Let me read the worker code first, then deploy it.
The worker files don't exist in the project. Let me check the history files to understand what worker code was previously created.

responseMessageContents.text:
The token was rejected by Cloudflare with authentication error (status 400, code 9106). This means the token is either expired, revoked, or doesn't have the required permissions.

Please generate a new Cloudflare API token with these permissions:
- **Account > Cloudflare Workers Scripts > Edit**
- **Account > Account Settings > Read**

You can create one at: https://dash.cloudflare.com/profile/api-tokens
